story.text: # 🔮 The Grimoire — a Spellbook of Atoms

The agentprivacy grimoires, expressed as a forkable wiki: each **spell**, **proverb**, **incantation**, **vertex**, **blade**, and **poem** is its own interlinked page, cross-linked to the persona who casts it. Sources: `city_of_mages_grimoire_v1.8.1` + `privacymage_grimoire_v10.4` + Selene's Spellbook (`privacymage_book`). A sibling of the [agentprivacy guide](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors).

## Sections

- ✨ [[The Spells]] (70) — the verbs the personas cast.
- ⬢ [[The Incantations]] (18) — the unified cross-spellbook spells.
- 🔷 [[The Vertices]] (17) — the named lattice vertices + inhabitants.
- 📜 [[The Proverbs]] — the headline proverbs + master invocations.
- ⚖️ [[The Principles]] — the privacymage principles.
- ⚔️ [[The Forged Blades]] — the blades chronicled on spellweb.
- 🌙 [[The Poems]] (14) — Selene's Spellbook, part by part.
